---
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [date, title]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  date-format: iso
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<!-- zdog 3D hero canvas -->
<section class="hero-section">
  <canvas id="hero-canvas" width="500" height="500"></canvas>

  <div class="hero-content">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">Head of Analytics &middot; Companies House</p>
    <h1 class="hero-title">
      Ross<br><span class="accent">Bowen</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      I like <a href="https://stat.columbia.edu/~gelman/book/">Bayesian statistics</a>,
      <a href="http://www.stat.columbia.edu/~gelman/research/published/multi2.pdf">multilevel models</a>
      and <a href="https://r4ds.hadley.nz/">R</a>. I think
      <a href="https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4742505/pdf/13423_2015_Article_947.pdf">confidence intervals are overrated</a>
      and <a href="https://www.ejwagenmakers.com/inpress/HoekstraEtAlPBR.pdf">misunderstood</a>.
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-scroll">
    <span>scroll</span>
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<script src="https://unpkg.com/zdog@1/dist/zdog.dist.min.js"></script>
<script>
(function () {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('hero-canvas');
  if (!canvas) return;

  const TAU = Zdog.TAU;

  // Palette
  function adjustColor(hex, amt) {
    const n = parseInt(hex.replace('#',''), 16);
    return '#' + [n>>16, (n>>8)&0xff, n&0xff]
      .map(c => Math.min(255,Math.max(0,c+amt)).toString(16).padStart(2,'0'))
      .join('');
  }

  const illo = new Zdog.Illustration({
    element: canvas,
    dragRotate: false,
    zoom: 1.15,
    rotate: { x: -0.2, y: 0.4 },
  });

  // Central glowing sphere
  new Zdog.Shape({ addTo:illo, stroke:32, color:'#a78bfa' });

  // Icosahedron wireframe
  const goldenRatio = (1 + Math.sqrt(5)) / 2;
  const icoRaw = [
    [-1,goldenRatio,0],[1,goldenRatio,0],[-1,-goldenRatio,0],[1,-goldenRatio,0],
    [0,-1,goldenRatio],[0,1,goldenRatio],[0,-1,-goldenRatio],[0,1,-goldenRatio],
    [goldenRatio,0,-1],[goldenRatio,0,1],[-goldenRatio,0,-1],[-goldenRatio,0,1],
  ];
  const S = 62;
  const verts = icoRaw.map(([x,y,z]) => {
    const l = Math.sqrt(x*x+y*y+z*z);
    return { x:x/l*S, y:y/l*S, z:z/l*S };
  });
  [[0,1],[0,5],[0,7],[0,10],[0,11],[1,5],[1,7],[1,8],[1,9],
   [2,3],[2,4],[2,10],[2,11],[3,4],[3,6],[3,8],[3,9],
   [4,5],[4,9],[4,11],[5,9],[5,11],[6,7],[6,8],[6,10],
   [7,8],[7,10],[8,9],[10,11]
  ].forEach(([a,b]) =>
    new Zdog.Shape({ addTo:illo,
      path:[{...verts[a]},{...verts[b]}],
      stroke:2, color:'rgba(124,58,237,0.6)' })
  );

  // Orbiting cubes
  const orbitGroups = [
    { r:105, phase:0,           size:16, color:'#ff4d6d' },
    { r:105, phase:TAU/3,       size:16, color:'#7c3aed' },
    { r:105, phase:2*TAU/3,     size:16, color:'#06b6d4' },
    { r:155, phase:TAU/6,       size:11, color:'#10b981' },
    { r:155, phase:TAU/6+TAU/2, size:11, color:'#f59e0b' },
    { r:68,  phase:TAU/5,       size:9,  color:'#ec4899' },
    { r:68,  phase:4*TAU/5,     size:9,  color:'#a78bfa' },
  ].map(d => {
    const g = new Zdog.Anchor({ addTo:illo, rotate:{ y:d.phase } });
    new Zdog.Box({ addTo:g,
      width:d.size, height:d.size, depth:d.size, stroke:false,
      color:d.color,
      leftFace:adjustColor(d.color,-25), rightFace:adjustColor(d.color,-25),
      topFace:adjustColor(d.color,25),   bottomFace:adjustColor(d.color,-50),
      translate:{ x:d.r },
    });
    const spd = (0.004 + Math.random()*0.004) * (Math.random()<0.5?1:-1);
    return { anchor:g, speed:spd };
  });

  // Scattered dots
  for (let i=0; i<28; i++) {
    const theta = Math.random()*TAU;
    const phi2  = Math.acos(2*Math.random()-1);
    const r     = 110 + Math.random()*90;
    const COLS  = ['#ff4d6d','#7c3aed','#06b6d4','#10b981','#f59e0b','#ec4899','#a78bfa'];
    new Zdog.Shape({ addTo:illo,
      stroke: 4 + Math.random()*5,
      color: COLS[Math.floor(Math.random()*COLS.length)],
      translate:{
        x: r*Math.sin(phi2)*Math.cos(theta),
        y: r*Math.sin(phi2)*Math.sin(theta),
        z: r*Math.cos(phi2),
      },
    });
  }

  let tick = 0;
  function animate() {
    tick++;
    illo.rotate.y += 0.004;
    illo.rotate.x = -0.2 + Math.sin(tick*0.007)*0.09;
    orbitGroups.forEach(({anchor,speed}) => {
      anchor.rotate.y += speed;
      anchor.rotate.x += speed*0.35;
    });
    illo.updateRenderGraph();
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  }
  animate();
})();

</script>

<!-- Blog posts section -->
<div class="posts-wrap">
  <p class="posts-label">Writing</p>
```

::: {#listing}
:::

```{=html}
</div>
```
